svg.title: LLM Gateway Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Polyglot LLM Gateway: Go gateway service receives client requests, passes through rate limiter and safety sidecar (Python/FastAPI), then routes to Gemini or Groq Cloud APIs. Experiment logger records all requests.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the client send to the LLM gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does the token bucket rate limiter work in the Go gateway?')
sendPrompt('What does the request parser and validator do in the gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does the Go gateway call the Python safety sidecar?')
sendPrompt('How does A/B model routing work between Gemini and Groq?')
sendPrompt('What gets recorded in the experiment log?')
g.text: JSONL log · prompt hash · latency · safety scores

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the prompt injection detector work with rule-based and semantic layers?')
sendPrompt('How does the jailbreak detector classify adversarial prompts?')
sendPrompt('How does the PII detector use Microsoft Presidio?')

svg.text: asyncio.gather() → verdict: PASS | BLOCK · score · masked_prompt

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Gemini API adapter work in Go?')
sendPrompt('How does the Groq Cloud adapter work in Go?')
